title: MoreChatMessages
description: Mod that adds more QOL chat messages
body:
# MoreChatMessages
This Fabric mod adds Quality Of Life messages from modern Minecraft to Beta 1.7.3 chat on a server!

## Features:
- Advancement messages
- Death messages
- Player is sleeping & Skipping night messages (Skipping night message won't work without player sleeping message)
- Join, Leave and First Join messages
- Ability to configure all of the above messages and to disable any of them
